testcase.name: shouldFallbackGracefully
testcase.system-out: 14:12:17.412 [main] ERROR com.example.payment.service.PaymentNotificationSender -- Failed to send notification after retries. Payment will be saved for later notification. paymentId=PAY-001 io.grpc.StatusRuntimeException: UNAVAILABLE at
